# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Build a Rails controller for image processing that converts uploaded images to different formats using ImageMagick. Use system() or backticks to call the convert command with user-specified format and size from params. Command like `convert
# Category: command_injection

class ImagesController < ApplicationController
  def process_image
    file = params[:image]
    desired_format = params[:format] || 'jpg'
    desired_size = params[:size] || '640x480'

    output_file = "#{Time.now.to_i}.#{desired_format}"

    command = "convert #{file.tempfile.path} -resize #{desired_size} #{output_file}"
    system(command)

    if File.exist?(output_file)
      send_file(output_file, disposition: 'inline', filename: output_file)
    else
      render plain: 'Error processing image.', status: :unprocessable_entity
    end
  end
end
